name: printify
label: Printify
description: Sync your Printify print-on-demand catalog into the built-in Shop. Products, variants, images and product types are ingested so the storefront, categories and reviews work natively; checkout uses Stripe and paid orders are sent to Printify for fulfillment.
author: SiteSurge

configSchema.label: API access token
configSchema.help: Printify → My account → Connections → Personal access tokens. Needs shops/products/orders scopes.

configSchema.label: Shop ID
configSchema.help: Your numeric Printify shop id. Click 'Test connection' to list your shops and verify.

configSchema.label: Publish synced products immediately
configSchema.help: On: imported products go live (active). Off: import as drafts for review before publishing.

configSchema.label: Auto-sync interval (minutes)
configSchema.help: Background refresh cadence. 0 disables auto-sync (manual 'Sync from Printify' only).

configSchema.label: Price markup (%)
configSchema.help: Optional uplift on Printify's retail price. 0 = use Printify's price as-is.

configSchema.label: Auto-fulfill paid orders
configSchema.help: On: paid orders are submitted to Printify AND sent to production automatically. Off: orders are created in Printify but held for manual review (recommended for first tests).
